name: powerapps-codeapp-setup
description: Scaffold a complete, deployable Power Apps Code App from a short interactive intake. Generates the full React + TypeScript + Vite + Tailwind skeleton, wires up SharePoint / Office 365 Users / Outlook connectors, and walks the user through pac auth -> npm run setup -> npm run connect -> npm run push. Encodes the silent-failure gotchas around SharePoint Choice and Person field writes.
